description: The project is a new construction of a K-8 Educational Facility on University of New Orleans' campus. The submission is for the Student Dining/Commons building that is 1 story and approximately 10,500 SF and located behind the 3 story academic building (reviewed under permit # 22-28721). New parking on the west side of property for the new school facility and new parking on the north side will be exclusively for UNO. Existing parking on the east will be modified as necessary. The project includes all new electrical, mechanical, plumbing, fire protection, kitchen equipment, and security. All work to be done as per plans. Stormwater management is under 22-28721-NEWC TEMPORARY CERTIFICATE OF OCCUPANCY ISSUED 6-25-24 FOR 90 DAYS - CLOSEOUT OF DESIGN REVIEW AND STORMWATER MANAGEMENT FINAL C/O ISSUED ON 8/13/24
